entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop grown in hybrids in farmers fields and surveyed for disease incidence.

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: A disease affecting pearl millet caused by the pathogen Sclerospora graminicola.

entities.name: SCLEROSPORA GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen responsible for causing downy mildew in pearl millet.

entities.name: MAHARASHTRA
entities.description: A state in India where the survey was conducted across 8 districts.

entities.name: RAJASTHAN
entities.description: A state in India where the survey was conducted across 6 districts.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the research study was conducted.

entities.name: OOSPORE PRODUCTION
entities.description: The production of oospores by Sclerospora graminicola on pearl millet hybrids.

entities.name: INCIDENCE
entities.description: The mean occurrence rate of downy mildew in pearl millet hybrids.

entities.name: SURVEY
entities.description: The experimental process of examining farmers fields to record disease presence and oospore production.
